subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the lights of the Kingdom when he turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon and heard the call of his Lord, the Most Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الملکوت اذ اقبل الی الافق الاعلی و سمع ندآء ربه الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
